title: Microbes near and far
summary: How microbe communities live in dramatically different habitats — Yellowstone hot springs / deep-sea vents / human gut / soil underground — and what each community teaches about the others. Cultural-respect register per .claude/rules/distributed-narrative.md § cultural-sensitivity gates: TEK / Indigenous-knowledge credit framing required where relevant; NEVER appropriative / decontextualizing lexicon. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase4Kits().
